name: Interface Synthesizer
description: Interface for synthesizing OpenBindings interfaces from binding artifacts. Given a source artifact governed by a binding specification (e.g., an OpenAPI document), an interface synthesizer extracts operations, schemas, sources, and bindings into an OBI document.

BindingSpecInfo.description: Information about a supported binding specification.

bindingSpec.description: Binding specification identifier, exact and opaque (e.g., openbindings.openapi@1, openbindings.mcp@1).

description.description: Human-readable description of this binding specification.

SynthesizeInterfaceSource.description: A binding source to synthesize an interface from.

bindingSpec.description: Binding specification identifier governing this source.

name.description: Key name for this binding source in the output.

location.description: Location to fetch content from (path or URL).

outputLocation.description: Location to reference in the output.

embed.description: If true, embed content inline in the output.

openbindings.interface-synthesizer.listB.description: List the binding specifications this synthesizer can synthesize interfaces from, by exact identifier.

openbindings.interface-synthesizer.synth.description: Synthesize a creation-time-sound OpenBindings interface, optionally from binding source artifacts. Every emitted binding resolves to a supported target and admits a faithful invocation path; refuse instead of silently returning a partial interface when an accepted callable target cannot be represented faithfully.
